predictions.source_quote: Our S&P 500 price targets are 5,000 for June 2022 and 5,100 for December 2022.
Our S&P 500 price targets are 5,000 for June 2022 and 5,100 for December 2022.
our economics team expects robust economic growth of 4.5% in 2022 and solid growth of 2.9% in 2023.
our economics team expects robust economic growth of 4.5% in 2022 and solid growth of 2.9% in 2023.
we now expect 2022 EPS of USD 235 (12% growth) up from USD 233 previously.
We are also introducing a 2023 EPS estimate of USD 255 (9% growth)
Our fixed income team's expectations for an increase in longer-term interest rates (10-year Treasury yield to reach 2% by June)
the futures markets are suggesting that the Fed funds rate will rise from 0.1% to about 0.8% by the end of 2022. That equates to about three rate hikes of a quarter percentage point each.
Our commodity team believes spot oil prices should reach USD 82 by mid-year.
